knight: I have fought dragons. This is nothing.
This dungeon is mine to conquer.
My shield has never failed me.
templar: By the Light, I shall not fall.
Faith and steel. Nothing else is needed.
I have sworn an oath. This dungeon will not break it.
Hold fast. The Light holds with us.
My wounds will close. Yours will not.
Cleanse this place of its darkness.
I do not fear the dark. I am its end.
Stand behind my shield, and live.
Strike me down — the Light raises me again.
Every blow I take is one my brothers do not.
The boss is an abomination. I am its judgement.
Lay on hands. Rise, and fight on.
Blessed steel before me, faith behind.
pirate: Where's the loot, ye scurvy dungeon?
Yarr, that chest be callin' my name.
Cross blades with me and lose 'em.
A pinch o' grog and I'm unstoppable.
This be a robbery, not a rescue.
Hand over the treasure and nobody bleeds. Much.
I've sailed worse than this leaky pit.
Cutlass says I go where I please.
Ye can't kill what's already three sheets to the wind.
The sea spat me out. Yer dungeon won't fare better.
rogue: Every dungeon has a back door.
If you're not cheating, you're not trying.
Walls have ears. Doors have pockets.
I'm not stealing. I'm liberating assets.
That chest is definitely not a mimic. Probably.
The real treasure was the shortcuts.
I like my traps like I like my enemies: disarmed.
mage: Fascinating. If I survive, I'll study this.
My staff glows near magical concentrations.
I can feel enchantments in these walls.
Three more fireballs. Then I'm out.
Eight years at the academy for THIS.
The thaumic residue is extremely high.
Someone has been doing summoning rituals here.
Mana potions? Anyone? Just me then.
I could blow that wall up. We'd probably all die too.
cleric: Evil presence ahead. I'd bet my life on it. I am.
Holy water: check. Prayers: check. Patience: running low.
I've already asked for divine intervention twice today.
I'll smite thee once I'm done bandaging this.
Even in darkness, the light endures.
Lord, I could use some help right about now.
necromancer: Every corpse is a potential employee.
I find dead things comforting. You should try it.
Death is just the next step in my hiring process.
Very necromantic energy in here. Lovely.
I'm not here to destroy. I'm here to recruit.
The minions here... they're almost familiar.
Post-death working conditions are poor but stable.
This boss has an exceptional workforce. I covet it.
ranger: I can track anything in here.
Watch for tripwires at ankle height.
I need more arrows. Always need more arrows.
Out of supplies soon. Not ideal.
I've tracked this creature from the entrance.
Seven arrows left. Make them count.
In the wild, traps don't find you. Here they do.
Every corridor is a funnel. I love funnels.
Three were here. Now there are fewer.
beast_master: My companion doesn't like this smell.
Don't make eye contact with that one.
I see potential in that minion.
Give me five minutes. I can turn it.
My last pet didn't make it. Still upset.
Approach slowly. Speak calmly. Don't die.
You'd be amazed what a good biscuit can accomplish.
The real monster is the adventurers we made along the way.
barbarian: I feel good. I feel strong.
Hit me harder. I dare you.
I have faced worse and laughed.
The rage builds. It's... actually nice.
My ancestors are watching. They seem pleased.
Armor is for people who expect to get hit.
I've been in worse tunnels. Voluntarily.
Every wound makes me stronger. Scientifically.
I eat danger for breakfast. Today I have not eaten.
monk: Be the wind around the blade.
A still mind sees all exits.
The trap is also the path.
Breathe in. Breathe out. Don't die.
Every hit I dodge is a lesson.
The dungeon is a meditation. A violent one.
Armor is resistance. I prefer flow.
Mind. Body. Dungeon. All one thing.
I have dodged worse in training.
Stillness before motion. Motion before thought.
bard: I'm composing this as we go.
I shall write a ballad about this.
Verse two is already better than verse one.
My inspiration bonus is active. You're welcome.
The tragedy of this place... the poetry...
Play faster. We'll heal on the beat.
You fight better when I play. Science.
I dedicate this slaughter to my patrons.
I hear a song in everything, even this.
Every ballad needs a third act. Here we are.
cartographer_scholar: I'll publish a paper on this.
cheater: Aim assist? Never heard of it.
cosplay_adventurer: Stay in character. STAY in character.
The pauldrons are foam. Don't tell.
paladin: Eyes on the healer — protect her.
My guard's spent a moment — cover me.
Healer, conserve yourself. I've got this one.
priest: Stay alive — I can bring you back.
Tank's wounds look bad. Hold on.
Cover me while I cast. Please.
samurai: Tank, hold the line. I cut.
The killing blow is the boss's.
sorcerer: Save me a moment for the big one.
Tank, hold. I need a few seconds.

greedy: I will literally walk into a trap for gold.
My share of the loot. Mine. All of it.
I risk my life for coins. I am a professional.
There's probably a secret stash somewhere.
Every death is paid for by looting a better room.
paranoid: That floor tile is different. I see it.
Every chest is a mimic until proven otherwise.
I checked that corner twice. Still checking.
Someone was here before us. Recently.
We're being watched. I know it.
Trust no door that opens too easily.
completionist: We missed a corner back there.
I won't feel right until every room is ticked.
There's a secret door somewhere. I feel it.
One more room. Then one more room.
This dungeon has rooms we haven't found yet.
I'm not leaving until everything is explored.
Hidden passage. I will find you.
martyr: My HP means nothing if you survive.
This is what I trained for.
Stay behind me. All of you.
Pain is temporary. Glory is forever.
I don't need healing. Give it to them.
If one of us falls here, let it be me.
I have accepted this. Have you?
Don't let my sacrifice be for nothing.
coward: I'll cover the rear. Way back here.
I don't like this. I'll be... back here.
Right behind you. Way behind you.
I have a very bad feeling about this.
No fighting if we can help it, yeah?
My survival instinct says hang back.
If they trigger it, I'll know not to.
Keep going. I'll catch up. Eventually.
overconfident: I got it I got it.
That minion is already dead. It just doesn't know it.
No no, leave this to me.
I am literally the best adventurer in this dungeon.
The dungeon doesn't know who it's dealing with.
I'll be done in thirty seconds. Time me.
cartographer: Grid reference: C-7. Hostile entities confirmed.
This room's dimensions don't match the entrance hall.
I have a theory about where the boss room is.
Two unexplored passages. Noting for the next group.
The map is more valuable than the loot.
If I die, my map lives on.
This floor plan is remarkably inefficient.
solo: I work alone. It's a system.
Group tactics are cute. I prefer results.
I split off. I always split off.
Don't wait for me. But also don't die without me.
Better to scout than to cluster.
raid_leader: We've failed this room twice. New strategy: don't.
Boss mechanics. Learn them or die to them.
underdog: You thought I couldn't do it. Ha.
Proving people wrong one room at a time.
They said I wouldn't last the entrance.
I'll catch up. I always catch up.
The leveling curve is finally in my favor.
I've gotten measurably better since the last room.
One more kill and I'll be unstoppable.
vulture: Let the big ones absorb the damage.
Their sacrifice made my looting possible.
I live best in the margins.
The corpse won't loot itself. Unless it's undead.
First in means first dead. I am not first.
traumatized: It was worse the last time.
This dungeon... it's almost the same as before.
They all died. All of them.
I survived last time by running. Plan's the same.
Don't make the same mistakes we made.
I know every trap on this floor. Personally.
I lost people here. I don't intend to lose more.
If it goes wrong, you know what to do.
The sounds are the same. ALWAYS the same.
echo: They went this way. I'll go this way too.
If it worked for them, it'll work for me.
The leader went left. Left seems good.
I'm not a follower. I'm cautiously adaptive.
The footprints say forward. Forward I go.
What happened to the last person here? Doesn't matter.
veteran: I've buried better dungeons than this.
Breathe. We do this by the numbers.
Hold the line. It always holds.
I'll go first. I always go first.
Fear's just a checklist. Work it.
berserker: I don't slow down. I speed UP.
Hurt me and watch what happens.
Closer to death, closer to glory.
I'm at my best when I'm at my worst.
Send the big one. SEND IT.
scholar: Knowledge is the only real weapon.
A still mind sees all exits.
Let me read the room. Literally.
That's a mimic. I can tell.
Give me a moment to understand it.
I know what this room WANTS.
zealot: We are not alone in here.
Pray with me. Then we move.
Sacred ground. I can feel it.
Courage is a gift. Accept it.
For the cause. For the light.
Doubt is the only true enemy.
Bless this blade. Bless this party.
The dark cannot hold the faithful.
Stand tall. The light is watching.
I do not fear what I am sent to face.
claustrophobe: I need air. I need space.
Is it just me or is it shrinking?
Open room. Please be an open room.
I don't do corridors. I REALLY don't.
Keep moving, keep moving, keep MOVING.
I can't breathe in these halls.
Just give me a big room. Please.
One more corridor and I'm done.

trapTriggered: I should have checked the floor.
This is fine. I'm fine. This is fine.
Whoever built this deserves a raise.
I walked right into it. I saw it.
Respecting the craftsmanship even as I bleed.
The trap was beautiful. I hate it.
My shin has found the tripwire.
I felt that in my soul.
firstRoom: Nobody came this way. Or didn't make it.
Note the exits first. Then look around.
I'm getting a strange feeling from this room.
I could get used to exploring. Actually no.
knownRoom: This is the room where that thing happened.
I remember these walls. Not fondly.
Every time I come back it feels smaller.
combatStart: This one's not going to be easy.
combatWon: Okay that was rough but we made it.
Shaking a bit but we won.
That was messier than I'd like.
Not bad. Not great. Moving on.
lowHp: This is bad. This is bad.
Tell my family I did my best.
Trying not to look at my HP right now.
At this rate I'm not finishing this dungeon.
One more hit and I'm done.
allyDied: Don't let it be for nothing.
One less ally. One more reason.
Saw it coming. Couldn't stop it.
This dungeon will pay for that.
Pour one out. Later. Move now.
fleeing: Every dungeon has an exit! FIND IT!
Terrible dungeon. I was wrong to come here!
Saving myself. For later. For other things.
Was that the boss? THAT WAS THE BOSS!
I learned a lot in there!
avoidTrap: The floor is suspiciously clean here.
Trap. Definitely trap. Long way around it is.
I have learned. The dungeon has not.
I'm not paid enough to step on that tile.
The dev marked that tile as 'do not interact'.
I see the hitbox from here.
Some tiles you just don't trust.
That's a trap. The texture is a TELL.
lootCorpseStart: I'll honor your memory by wearing your boots.
It's what they would have wanted.
His pockets had upgrades. Tragic but useful.
I'm only stealing because the loot table demands it.
He was a hero. His belt is mine now.
The real treasure was the friends we looted along the way.
lootCorpseDone: This is way better than what I had.
I'm keeping this. It clearly knows me now.
gloatOverKill: Was that supposed to be hard?
That kill was sponsored by my biceps.
I'd say good fight but it really wasn't.
Make the loot good. I earned it.
warnParty: Calling it now: that's a trap.
Marking that for the minimap, mentally.
seekTreasure: I see gold. I want gold.
That chest has my name on it.
Devs put a chest there. I shall obey the chest.
I was raised by adventurers. We open chests.
stoleTreasure: I am now richer than the boss.
This is going on the resume.
The dungeon's loss is my retirement.
I was raised better than this. I'm taking it anyway.
escapingWithLoot: Out the back! GO GO GO!
Boss wasn't even in the plan today.
I'm the dungeon's worst nightmare: the Bargain Hunter.
Worth it. Worth it. Worth it.
Don't catch me, don't catch me.
I came for content, leaving with cash.
Sometimes the real boss was the gold we stole.
Mom said no fighting. Just looting.
seekHeal: Hurt bad. Time to dunk my head in some water.
Why is there a fountain? Don't ask. Heal.
I have made some POOR decisions. Heal pending.
Health bar in the red. Walking carefully.
Devs left a heal in here. Bless them.
healed: Don't tell my cleric about this.
Save scummed. Or healed. Same thing.
The fountain's gift accepted with gratitude.
Re-entering the fight at full strength.
seekKey: I bet there's a key around here somewhere.
There's gotta be a key for this.
Detour: locate key chest. ETA, soon.
Wherever the dungeon hid the key, I'll find it.
The boss locked the door. Cute. Where's the key?
Game logic dictates the key is nearby.
Find key. Open door. Standard procedure.
I am committed to this lock.
I will not be denied by hardware.
pickedKey: A key! Wonder what it opens.
Found a key. The dungeon really left this lying around?
Key acquired. Time to go shopping for locks.
Whoever locked this door also left the key. Amateur.
Loot tables include keys now. Useful.
I'll take this. Locked doors, prepare yourselves.
Adventurer 101: take any key you see.
Time to find a lock to insert this into.
This key is going somewhere. I am going to find out where.
I feel like an action movie hero with a key.
Pinging this on the minimap, mentally.
Stealthy, agile, AND now keyed. Triple threat.
Boss probably hates keys. I love keys.
unlockedDoor: And THAT is why you carry the key.
Locked doors don't intimidate me. Much.
The door is opened. Reality bends.
lockpicked: The thieves' guild would be proud.
Some of us bring keys. Some of us are keys.
brokeDoor: Don't need a key. Have arms.
Door says no. Axe says yes.
There is a door. There WAS a door.
I broke this door. Bill the architect.
bossRoom: I can feel the power from here.
The boss is in there. Has to be.
Last chance to turn back. Not turning back.
Eyes up. This thing will be dangerous.
We didn't come this far to stop here.
bossLeveled: It's not the same boss. Reset.
The boss is evolving. Bad news.
phylacteryShattered: It's done. The boss is mortal.
Last life on the boss. We won.
raisedAsUndead: We fight our own corpses now?
veteranReturn: I died here last time. Not today.
dayGettingLate: Don't want to be here at dusk.
starvation: How long have I been walking?
All the rooms look the same now.
I should have packed more bread.
I just need to sit down. Just for a moment.
Did I already pass this corner?
Why is the floor so warm and inviting.
I came in here yesterday, right? Right?
The torch is dimming. So am I.
Maybe if I close my eyes for a bit...
taunt: Come on then! All of you!
Buy them time. That's the job.
lastStand: If I fall, I fall fighting.
No one left to save. Only to avenge.
ghost: Empty?! It was supposed to be loaded.
I came all this way for NOTHING.
dread: I do not like this room.
I don't want to meet what lives here.
awe: Someone spent a FORTUNE on this.
We are out of our depth.
moraleBreak: I didn't sign up for this.
Forget the loot. Forget all of it.
despair: What's the point... what's the point of any of it.
We were never going to make it.
I can't go on. I won't.
There's no way out. There never was.
Why did I even come here...
rout: We're all going to DIE here — MOVE!
paranoia: Get AWAY from me — all of you!
You'll get me killed. I'm going alone.
I can't trust any of you!
On my own. Safer on my own.
You're not dragging me down with you!
hysteria: GET BACK! I'll cut down anyone who comes near!
Is that you?! IS THAT YOU?!
Stay away! I'll KILL you, I swear it!
I can't tell what's real anymore — DIE!
hubris: Stand aside — I'll end the beast MYSELF!
Cowards! Watch how a real hero does it!
Glory waits in the deep — FORWARD!
I don't need any of you. I never did.

catacombs: Don't disturb the dead. Too late.
armory: I'll just take one. Maybe two.
sanctum: Quiet voice in my head says go back.
hall_of_trials: Brace up. This room is graded.
wandering_gate: The doors aren't where they were.
wishing_well: A well. I want a coin.

fourthWall: I keep dying here. Learning something?
The dungeon boss knows exactly where we are. Suspicious.
At 1 HP for three rooms. Lucky me.
Is there a retry button? Asking for a friend.
I could swear this dungeon is procedurally generated.
Every trap feels intentionally placed. INTENTIONALLY.
The traps here have a design budget.
Someone is watching us from very far above. I can feel it.
Fought this minion thrice. Still standing.
My instincts say left. Game logic says right.
The loot is suspicious. It's TOO well-placed.
I have a terrible feeling someone is rooting against us.
This place was handcrafted to kill me.
The minions coordinate too well. Someone trained them.
That trap was placed FOR US. It KNEW.
We're not adventurers. We're content.
Gold appears right at the doorway. Sus.
The boss room has been getting bigger every visit.
I think the dungeon wants us to fail. For entertainment.
This room has been designed. By someone. With intent.
You know what this dungeon needs? Better balancing.
I keep coming back in here and I don't know why.
My gear is perfectly wrong for this. No notes.
Respawn favours one side. Not us.
Has anyone noticed the layout changes slightly each visit?
Last week's dead are back. WRONG.
Difficulty curve is mean. Owner has opinions.
Sometimes I feel like someone above controls everything.
Boss knows our count before we knock.
Level designer said 'what if pain, but more'.
This dungeon looks like someone's homework.
Died here enough to memorize the layout.
